title: Stunning Bows
description: Make some Stunning bows in Minecraft!
body:
![b0ws](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f8783764624defb6c61d355a096060386ff72d5.png)
[![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/2qn652Uytz) 
[![forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/forge-000000?style=for-the-badge&logoUrl=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MinecraftForge/branding@master/F_logo_small.gif&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stunning-bows)


## FEATURES
- The most powerful and beatiful bows in the game
- Exclusive achievements
- New unique recipes

## BOWS
- Bone Bow
- Copper Bow
- Golden Bow
- Iron Bow
- Diamond Bow
- Netherite Bow
- Nether Bow
- Stunning Bow

## WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?
Actually, this mod adds some new bows, strings, and nuggets.

## DESCRIPTION
Bows in order of strength(velocity, durability and more): Bone Bow, Copper Bow, Nether Bow, Iron Bow, Diamond Bow, Netherite Bow, Stunning Bow.
To create each of them (except some) you will need the use of ore and exclusive strings.
You can check Gallery for more information.
